name: perplexity_search
description: Search the web using Perplexity Sonar AI. Returns a direct, synthesized answer with citations instead of raw search links. Ideal for agents that need factual, up-to-date information.

query.description: The question or search query (e.g., 'What is the capital of France?' or 'latest AI research breakthroughs')

model.description: Search model: 'sonar' (fast, lightweight) or 'sonar-pro' (deeper answers, more citations)

recency.description: Filter sources by how recent they are. Omit for no time filter.

max_tokens.description: Maximum length of the answer in tokens
